name: Tracie
message: East Tennessee born and raised… welcome and am enjoying “walking” beside you along your journey!

name: Dawn
message: Just stumbled across your page! Thank you for making your journey public. We have hiked bits and pieces of the trail in different states at different times. Each of them have so much beauty!  Looking forward to continuing following your journey, especially as you get to the northern states which I’ve never hiked through.. and this is bad ass. 🙌🏼🙌🏼 🍻🍻cheers doing the hard things

name: Julia Mackle
message: Hi Laura , I’m from the UK and your an inspiration, i promise i won’t moan on my 6 miles a day dog walk anymore after seeing what you do a day , good luck 🤞🏽
